creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 231456
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2

epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2 has been updated to 1.1.46.

diff -u -r -N -d epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.45/NEWS epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.46/NEWS
--- epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.45/NEWS     2021-12-20 02:45:32.000000000 +0000
+++ epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.46/NEWS     2022-01-24 04:35:11.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,6 +1,16 @@
 NEWS -- an overview of user-visible changes with each release
 
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
+epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.46                        (2022-01-24)
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+ * Supported new models
+
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.45.1                      (2021-12-22)
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+ * Supported new models
+
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
 epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.45                        (2021-12-14)
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
diff -u -r -N -d epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.44/NEWS epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.45/NEWS
--- epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.44/NEWS     2021-11-12 05:26:16.000000000 +0000
+++ epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.45/NEWS     2021-12-20 02:45:32.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,6 +1,11 @@
 NEWS -- an overview of user-visible changes with each release
 
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
+epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.45                        (2021-12-14)
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
+ * Supported new models
+
+----------------------------------------------------------------------
 epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.44                        (2021-11-12)
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
  * Supported new models

New PPD files for the following models have been added.
WF-C4810 series
EP-884A series

aarch64 has been dropped from ONLY_FOR_ARCHS.
I am trying to find ways to support it.
This has the potential to create ridiculous options like astro/geographiclib :)

The following build by poudriere is successful.
FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE 1203505 amd64
12.3-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE-p1 i386
